name: Gingered Rice and Apple Stuffed Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut the squash in half with the cut side down on a baking sheet and cover with foil.
3. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until tender.
4. Meanwhile, cook rice with tamari soy sauce.
5. When the squash is cool enough to handle, scoop out the pulp.
6. Chop the pulp and set aside.
7. Sauté onion and apples in oil until softened.
8. Stir in the cooked rice and remaining ingredients.
9. Stuff the squash halves with the rice mixture and arrange in a baking dish.
10. Bake for 20 minutes.
